name: operator-powers
description: Practical AI skills for non-technical knowledge work: real jobs done inside the AI you already use. A self-improving collection: what users run, rate, and request decides what each update adds.

interface.shortDescription: Practical AI skills for non-technical work.
interface.longDescription: A growing, maintained collection of practical AI skills for knowledge workers who aren't engineers. Audit your week, set up your AI to know how you work, mine meetings, pressure-test decisions, explain tricky ideas simply, de-slop your writing, and produce content assets. Kept updated, with new powers added as the most useful ones are found for non-technical people like us.
defaultPrompt: Audit my last two weeks and tell me what to focus on.
Turn these meeting notes into decisions and next steps.
Set up my AGENTS.md so my AI understands how I work.
